concerns.text: Power analysis deferred to implementation without minimum sample size framework. For detecting r≥0.5 with 80% power, n≥28-30 samples typically required. Plant herbivore stress studies often have smaller sample sizes. Need explicit power calculation framework before implementation.

Cross-species modeling (Arabidopsis + Solanum) mentions ComBat batch correction but doesn't address species-level confounds (different gene regulation, pathway architecture, metabolite profiles). Species differences may introduce systematic bias beyond batch effects.

Treatment condition confounds (herbivore stress vs control) not explicitly addressed. If samples span different treatment conditions, this could confound gene-metabolite relationships. Need to specify how treatment will be modeled or controlled.
